title: Club Registry

action.join_error: You need a phone to join clubs. Alternatively, ask a staff member to manually let you in.

accountNotReadyDialog.title: Your MySK account isn't ready yet
accountNotReadyDialog.desc: You need to have logged in to the main MySK app at least once to get your account set up.
accountNotReadyDialog.logInAgain: Once you're done, you can log in again here to continue.

accountNotFoundDialog.title: Account not found
accountNotFoundDialog.desc: There might be a problem with your account. If you are a current student, please report this issue via <0>this form</0>.

selectDialog.desc: Select a club to go to…

desc: Use the same email and password you use in MySK to continue.

joinedClubs.title: Joined clubs
joinedClubs.empty: You'll see clubs that you have joined here.
